title: pityrogramma calomelanos var. austroamericana
intro: Pityrogramma calomelanos var. austroamericana, also known as the Austro-American royal fern, is a species of fern belonging to the family Marattiaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The Austro-American royal fern has been used to alleviate symptoms of digestive disorders, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, offering potential health benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved immune function. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant can be used in teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for a range of applications in traditional medicine.
